hard_core.requirement: Every lane and internal work item states relation_to_hard_core: core wager, or belt with its legitimacy/byproduct function.
hard_core.lane_doctrine: Lane 1 is always the aggressive boundary-pushing core wager. Belt lanes (adapters, gates, packet machinery, legitimacy infrastructure) may legitimately LEAD priority when required for the legitimacy of the research/methodology, or when a byproduct is exciting enough (papers, potential spin-off repos). Invariant: once those resolve, priority shifts back to the core and continues pushing.
hard_core.belt_lane_record_2026_07_16: The Rank-2 runway (two-phase preregistration, firewalled packet drafts, independent Frame R re-freeze) is a belt lane that correctly LED while the legitimacy of the adjudication methodology required it. That runway is laid; priority now reverts to the core wager. Joe ratified this doctrine and record in direct chat, 2026-07-16.
hard_core.rank2_resolution_2026_07_16: The preregistered Rank-2 adjudication (RANK2-PR-001) EXECUTED on sovereign TAF-001 + TI-PIT-002 evidence (both accepted and imported, all gates PASS; prereg_verify all seven gates PASS). Referee-governed verdict: NO Rank-2 outcome licensed, construal-invariant; c4 access-side ROBUST_ZERO observed on both branches; c5 NOT_APPLICABLE (sovereign factor-declaration practice does not match the check's capability vocabulary -- successor needs a NEW prereg id); c6 missed; TI frame leg quarantine-blocked. Rank 2 is UNDISCHARGED with a narrowed prerequisite; the successor prereg is a banked belt item, NOT the next swing. The runway belt lane is RESOLVED: per the lane doctrine invariant, priority reverts to the core wager (P2C-REAL-PHYSICAL-WITNESS, rank 1). Record: explorations/2026-07-16-rank2-adjudication/.
hard_core.provenance: Joe ratified the five-persona panel synthesis with his own doctrine refinement, 2026-07-16, direct chat (trusted control channel).

selection_contract.reach_swing_cadence: Every third Progress swing must be a reach swing: attempt the opacity bound as a real theorem over a native formalism, or attempt the real physical witness. A failed reach swing is preserved as a first-class result, never suppressed or retried silently. Ratified by Joe 2026-07-16.
selection_contract.minimum_material_output: A model, theorem target, proof, counterexample, executable discriminator, or physical-case adjudication. A new schema, queue, packet wrapper, or narrative alone is insufficient.

lanes.relation_to_hard_core: IS the core wager: force or falsify the hierarchy's disclosure-vs-capability-change discrimination on a real physical case. Always the aggressive boundary-pushing lane; never demoted by difficulty.
lanes.purpose: Construct or kill a source-neutral physical boundary adapter and a real candidate witness that can be tested for capability change and irreducible issuance without absorbing source-repo truth.
lanes.current_authority: ADAPTER2-01 returned the GU-sign/finality-polarity identity to OPEN because the profile functor forgets the sign fiber. This lane concerns a physical boundary/source-to-capability adapter and must not silently retry that failed polarity adapter.
lanes.rerank_2026_07_16: P2C-REAL-PHYSICAL-WITNESS promoted above P2C-BOUNDARY-ADAPTER via explicit rank fields; honest priority scores unchanged (27 adapter, 25 witness). Rationale (five-persona panel, Joe ratified 2026-07-16 in direct chat): pick the real system first and let it discipline the definitions, rather than perfecting the adapter in the abstract and fitting a system to it.
lanes.kill_condition: If every admissible boundary transition factors through declared fixed dynamics, access, resources, or a legitimate completion, preserve the scoped no-go and narrow the hierarchy rather than inventing issuance.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not treat a packet schema, GU analogy, irreversible process, stochastic outcome, or added branch label as a constructed adapter or physical witness. Do not spend an hourly run retrying ADAPTER2-01 without new native source or target structure that meets its reopen burden.

internal_work_items.relation_to_hard_core: Core wager, most direct form: the hard core's claim is diagnosable-on-real-physical-cases, and this item supplies the real case. Led and executed a REACH swing 2026-07-16.
internal_work_items.swing_2026_07_16: REACH swing executed (Joe-authorized, direct chat). Survey of 8 physical systems across domains; picked the superconducting ring (quantized persistent supercurrent, BCS/Ginzburg-Landau) as the strongest non-toy capability candidate under Joe's frontier constraint. Candidate boundary event: cool N->S with flux present -> hold a quantized, locally-invariant, zero-maintenance-cost persistent circulating memory, a task absent in N at any budget. Strongest steelman rival: whole-family disclosure (fixed phase diagram) backed by seed(value) + metastability(persistence), at matched resource. Discriminator: fluxoid staircase (D-Q) + winding local-invariance (D-I) + persistence (D-P), first two measurable and real (Deaver-Fairbank/Doll-Nabauer 1961). Executable: tests/physical_witness_discriminator.py (exit 0, --strict clean, 7 [E] + 4 [F] = 11). Referee-governed disposition: SURVIVES_LOCAL_COMPLETIONS / UNDISCHARGED_VS_WHOLE_FAMILY, frame-indexed to a matched-budget counterfactual pair (R-D1). Candidate is NOT reduced by any local completion class on two measurable signatures; it survives only by refusing to admit the target phase into the fixed family -- the fixed-family absorber (falsifier F1), a cross-repo (TaF+TI) adjudication, NOT P2C-local. No enlargement verdict licensed. Files: explorations/2026-07-16-real-physical-witness/{SYNTHESIS,WITNESS-FREEZE,REFEREE-REPORT}.md. Success condition MET at exploration tier, scoped to the declared frame; item advanced with an open frontier, not closed.
internal_work_items.disposition_update_2026_07_16: Receiver disposition upgraded by the cross-repo combining adjudication (commit 512638a, conditions C1-C4 binding): from SURVIVES_LOCAL_COMPLETIONS / UNDISCHARGED_VS_WHOLE_FAMILY to SURVIVES_DECLARED_COMPLETION_FAMILY_AT_OPERATIONAL_CLASS / ABSORBED_AT_GLOBAL_ONTOLOGICAL_CLASS (frame-indexed; composite local completions untested per referee D2). No source status moved; the frozen P2C-W1 bundle is unchanged.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Continue only after the completion-closure swing, OR escalate the discriminator to Alternate B (topological entanglement entropy gamma=log D) or replicate in Alternate C (BEC quantized circulation, independent domain) -- both now doubly motivated as per-construction transfer tests (condition C4) and as F5-watch discriminators (does a cross-frame invariant quotient emerge?). Preserve construction-fork discipline; do not resolve the individuation fork by fiat.
internal_work_items.success_condition: A source-grounded candidate has matched before and after descriptions, a fixed intervention menu and budget, a native response, and a concrete discriminator from its strongest completion rival.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: The candidate reduces to unpredictability, irreversibility, hidden state, changed resources, changed access, stochastic seed, or a completed-history description.

internal_work_items.relation_to_hard_core: Belt serving the core directly: the adapter is the typed interface the core wager's witness must cross. Now LEADS (rerank_2026_07_16b): the real witness has disciplined the definitions per the prior rerank's intent, so the adapter should be built to consume the witness's concrete structure.
internal_work_items.rerank_2026_07_16b: After the P2C-REAL-PHYSICAL-WITNESS REACH swing executed, priority reverts to the adapter (rank 1) per the lane doctrine invariant (a leading item resolved -> continue pushing the core through its typed interface). The witness swing produced the concrete inputs the adapter now has to consume: the (Q,I,P) signature vector (quantization, local-op invariance, persistence), the matched-budget counterfactual frame, and the whole-family-admission residual (falsifier F1). The witness item drops to rank 2 (ADVANCED_OPEN_FRONTIER, honest score 22): its next move is either the gamma=log D escalation or a cross-repo return, both of which are better served after the adapter can carry the witness.
internal_work_items.swing_2026_07_16c: Witness-consuming adapter swing executed. Added tests/witness_boundary_adapter.py and explorations/2026-07-16-witness-boundary-adapter/SYNTHESIS.md. Result: ENDPOINT_POSITIVE_CONTRACT / F1_EXPOSED_NOT_ADJUDICATED. The adapter consumes the superconducting-ring witness's (Q,I,P) signature vector and matched-budget frame, respects relabel invariance and composition, rejects verdict-carrying metadata, treats resource-frame mismatch as RESOURCE_FRAME_CHANGED, and exposes whole_family_with_target_phase as WHOLE_FAMILY_ADMISSION_RESIDUAL rather than a capability verdict. Validation: fixture exit 0; strict TEF lint clean, headline 7 [E] + 4 [F] = 11. The immediate adapter task is advanced; next local priority is to formalize the legitimacy rule for target-phase whole-family admission.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Continue only after the target-phase completion-closure swing supplies a stricter admissibility rule or counterexample. Then rerun the witness adapter against that rule, or attempt a counterexample where the adapter becomes constant, verdict-carrying, representation-dependent, or equivalent to adding the missing datum by hand. Do not repeat the 2026-07-16c QIP fixture without new completion structure.
internal_work_items.success_condition: A typed nonconstant adapter acts on physical transition data, respects declared equivalences and composition, and exposes a testable residual without importing its polarity or verdict.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: Every candidate is constant, verdict-carrying, representation-dependent, or equivalent to adding the missing datum by hand.

internal_work_items.relation_to_hard_core: Belt required for legitimacy: the hard core's 'not mere completion/disclosure' clause is empty unless the legitimate completion class is formalized and closed under composition, so a witness's rival can be given its strongest hearing.
internal_work_items.rerank_2026_07_16c: Promoted after the witness-consuming adapter exposed whole_family_with_target_phase as the exact F1 residual. The next local swing should formalize when admitting the target phase into a fixed family is a legitimate completion and when it trivializes capability; this must happen before repeating the adapter or escalating the witness.
internal_work_items.rerank_2026_07_16d: Stays rank 1 and is now the F1 carrier after the cross-repo combining adjudication (explorations/2026-07-16-cross-repo-adjudication/). TI-WFA-001 showed CompletionClass v1 dissolves the fiat-trivialization branch via its conclusion-class firewall; the combined verdict is v1-relative (condition C2). The open question this item now owns: is an equivalent conclusion-class restriction DERIVABLE or NECESSARY in a P2C-owned completion class, or only stipulable -- or is there a counterexample legitimacy standard without a firewall that reopens absorption? Referee D2 adds a concrete target: close the class under declared COMPOSITIONS of local completions and test composite local absorbers (e.g., seed + hidden-state + history) against (Q,I,P), which no fixture has done.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Formalize the physically legitimate middle completion class with special focus on target-phase whole-family admission: include hidden-state, boundary, seed, provenance, resource, whole-family, history, access, relabeling, and gauge completions; state an admissibility rule for admitting the target phase; derive or refute a conclusion-class firewall rather than stipulating one; close under declared compositions and test composite local absorbers (referee D2 gap); produce omission mutants and a nontrivial escape or no-go theorem target. Compare with TI only through a frozen return.
internal_work_items.success_condition: The class is broad enough to absorb ordinary novelty but restricted by explicit physical admissibility, with executable composition and omission tests.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: The class is either trivially narrow or unrestricted enough to make every witness impossible by definition.

internal_work_items.relation_to_hard_core: Core wager's cross-repository closure step: combining sovereign returns on one frozen witness is how the hard core's 'locate exactly what cross-repository evidence establishes' clause is finally tested. Gated on frozen returns; legitimacy machinery (packets, gates) is its belt.
internal_work_items.activation: RE-ARM condition: a NEW frozen witness with sovereign returns on the same manifest (e.g., Alternate C BEC replication), OR a P2C-owned legitimate completion class ready for a second-standard re-adjudication of P2C-W1.
internal_work_items.activation_state_2026_07_16: ACTIVATED AND EXECUTED 2026-07-16 (Joe authorized, direct chat). Both sovereign frozen returns arrived for the unchanged P2C-W1 bundle: TAF-002 (capability SPLIT: change AFFIRMED frame-indexed to the declared budget-matched pair; factor named record-formation structure, non-deflationary; absorber not adjudicable by TaF's frame-taking contract) and TI-WFA-001 (whole-family admission LEGITIMATE-BUT-CONCLUSION-CAPPED at global/ontological; operational residue untouched). Both packets passed the full acceptance gate sequence and are imported (packets/imports/TAF-002, packets/imports/TI-WFA-001, commit 6ff1faa; TI's native schema deviation adjudicated openly in its import record).
internal_work_items.resolution_2026_07_16: Combining adjudication executed and referee-governed (explorations/2026-07-16-cross-repo-adjudication/{SYNTHESIS,REFEREE-REPORT}.md, commit 512638a). Success condition MET at exploration tier in the scoped, class-split form: one unchanged witness, one declared frame, ONE argument chain through formation, completion (each declared class singly + the capped absorber; composite local completions UNTESTED, referee D2), capability (frame-indexed, C1 task-semantics mapping at definitional-draft grade), finality NOT_REACHED (vacuous leg, recorded not hidden), neutrality, no-artificial-success. Combined verdict: SCOPED SURVIVOR, CLASS-SPLIT -- frame-indexed capability change survives the declared completion family per-class including the whole-family absorber (whose legitimate strength caps at global/ontological under CompletionClass v1), while the witness is simultaneously legitimately absorbed at global/ontological strength (no absolute-novelty claim). Kill condition checked by the governing referee and NOT triggered. Conditions binding on any citation: C1 mapping, C2 v1-relativity, C3 tau_P metastability cap, C4 individuation fork unforced (Located-Is-Not-Forced). F1: LIVE, NARROWED -- fiat-trivialization branch discharged relative to CompletionClass v1 only; remainder routed to P2C-NULL-COMPLETION-CLOSURE. F5: watch note (result permanently frame-indexed).
internal_work_items.next_swing: Dormant until the re-arm condition. Do not re-run the combination on the same two returns; new information arrives only via a new witness, a new sovereign return, or a P2C-owned completion class.
internal_work_items.success_condition: One unchanged witness survives the neutral formation, completion, capability, finality, and neutrality gates.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: The apparent pass combines different constructions, incompatible assumptions, or partial results.

handoffs.to_time_as_finality: Freeze and propose the same witness for an invariant capability-change adjudication; do not include a desired verdict.
handoffs.to_temporal_issuance: Freeze and propose the same witness for whole-family completion attack; do not assert source issuance.
handoffs.to_gu_formalization: Send only an adapter or witness packet whose interface is relevant to one frozen GU construction. GU retains native-versus-forced authority.
handoffs.return_activation: Any frozen sovereign return is a stewardship reranking signal, not automatic joint success.

lanes.relation_to_hard_core: Belt: definitions, literature, casebook, and reproducibility work that de-risks the core wager's witness campaign, or banks byproducts exciting enough to lead briefly (papers, spin-off candidates). May lead only per the lane doctrine; leadership reverts to the core when the leading item resolves.
lanes.purpose: Definitions, literature, casebook, and reader reproducibility work that directly de-risks the active witness campaign.
lanes.activation: Select only when it closes a named blocker for the active lane or no active technical item is executable.
lanes.forbidden_shortcut: Do not substitute synthesis prose or persona aggregation for a physical witness or discriminator.
